title: Satsu Iron man addon (Palladium)
description: A Iron man addon for palladium
body:
This is an addon for palladium that deals entirely with iron man,it is somewhat inspired by lego marvel avengers,where each armor had an animation to put on or they used a generic one,so the armors will have an animation to put on and some/most will have a unique one.
to start with you need to craft the arc reactor,the recipe is this one from here

_(The arc reactor needs to be recharged with a block, although it also recharges automatically. The higher you level it up, the more it recharges automatically and the maximum amount you can recharge, so you don't need the entire block)_
 ![The crafting table, 2 quartz, 1 redstone circuit, three redstones and 3 iron ingots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08d506a31ef9efb75b25431060dff02e866b4813.png)



To check the armor recipes you need the blueprint holder, which is crafted with the following recipe:
![8 papers and 1 blue tint](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/abe42389b1cdd99f6a7883d9589551f3c6be3fed.png)



With this, you can unlock the armors using experience and obtain the crafting recipe.
![A skill tree with all the armors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a26103d94d863c7b348d19d96a9eace8925f0609.png)



 To activate the mark 1 you need this block here:
 ![4 iron blocks and 1 copper block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/478394a2588b67a520ecb9df446a0d80d141dceb.png)
 Once crafted, place it on the ground and stand on top of it to activate it.



 To active the mark 2 from 4 you need this block:
 ![Black gantry block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d8565544d9d026ce87ace6c41ac234a36b12bef5.png)



Some armor pieces are a complete set, bracelets, or nanotechnology cards. You can review the crafting recipes in the blueprint holder
At the same time, there is an alloy that is required to obtain the armor. The recipe is as follows
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/555c7e6d04fe82aa5516346fb8e2fd0c2c09c476.png)



To craft the armors you need craft this block
With 2 blocks of wood, shears and a Fabric:
![Tailoring table](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d53b22ac15ff7d08dabe523edb1a4684f308fba1.png)



 You can create an ia with the following recipe:
 ![4 copper ingots, 4 redstone and 1 gold ingot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4693a95c48e7835508b8a74c53a930c7a431ca32.png)



_The armor needs to be recharged when you use it after a while or use the skills.
The recharge can be done with this block here, by holding it in your hand or standing on it:_
![8 redstone adn 1 glass block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94c5919ddb0fad7e9b43313c17a3dffa89c20407.png)



The more you improve the arc reactor the more energy you can store, reaching a point where you will start to recharge without the specific block.
at the same time you can choose the name of the ia, depending on the one you choose you will also change the color of it and its texts, with which you can have a sentinel armor at the moment you need it with the armor that is necessary, see exactly the energy you have and more functions in the future;

**In trello you can see all the armors avaibles at the moment and also their recipes**

[https://trello.com/b/55Z0xxj9/satsu-iron-man-addon](https://trello.com/b/55Z0xxj9/satsu-iron-man-addon)
(Credits to: TDreamer,4g28u,Ampel,Kamagi,Rengar_Z,Soceates for helpme on the trello)

If you would like to see teasers and previews related to the addon you can join my server:
https://discord.gg/PrwT4EccFF
Some armor skins are made by other people and not by me, I have asked permissions to use them, the skins along with the name of the creator are listed below_
(I also took inspiration from Doom_ mark 47 and edited Kill3rCreeper's one for the other armors : https://www.planetminecraft.com/skin/skin-proof/

https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/kill3rcreeper/

)
